title: Allow loading and saving ExternalTools XML from different locations
author: codearoo
body_snippet: I can save and open the connections XML, but not the External Tools one. I like to keep my connections XML in a synced folder (like OneDrive or GoogleDrive) but apparently I can't do that with my External Tools.

iterations.description: Enhancement request for configurable ExternalTools XML path has no concrete design proposal or user feedback after triage refresh comment asking for retest on latest build

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

A fix for this issue has been implemented in our community fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). A beta build including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and report if this resolves your issue.

---

> *We sincerely appreciate the mRemoteNG maintainers and the wonderful community that has kept this project alive and thriving for over a decade. Your work powers thousands of IT professionals worldwide, including us. Our fork ...

notes:
AI triage: Enhancement request for configurable ExternalTools XML path has no concrete design proposal or user feedback after triage refresh comment asking for retest on latest build
Approach: If validated, add a setting for custom ExternalTools XML path and update loader/saver to use it instead of hardcoded default location
